---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for JTS
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

(Describe the underlying need before jumping to a solution. "I want
to add a Spotify Connect device picker" is a solution; "my household
shares one Spotify account and I can't tell whose music is playing"
is the underlying problem.)

## What would the feature look like?

(How would you / your household interact with it? Happy path in a
sentence or two.)

## How does this fit with the existing architecture?

(Optional. If you've poked around the codebase, note which
subsystems it would touch and which HANDOFF doc is most relevant.
This is the fastest way to get a substantive response.)

## Alternatives considered

(Other ways to solve the same problem, and why you didn't pick them.)

## Are you offering to implement?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open the discussion now and submit a PR once we
  agree on approach
- [ ] No — just suggesting
